name: Charleston Chicken & Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups diced cooked chicken or turkey
1 tablespoon sauce diable or worcestershire sauce plus 1 tsp prepared mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok.
2. Add green onions and stir fry until soft.
3. Stir in rice until grains are coated with oil.
4. Pour in broth and water.
5. Add paprika, pepper, and salt.
6. Stir only until blended.
7. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce heat.
8. Simmer until rice is tender and almost all liquid has been absorbed.
9. Add chicken and pimiento.
10. Stir gently to blend.
11. Remove wok from heat and let stand, covered for about 10 minutes.
12. Stir in sauce diable or worcestershire sauce with mustard.
13. If necessary, return the wok to low heat.
14. Toss and stir gently with a fork until reheated.
